features: NATURAL VITAMIN C RADIANCE : VITAQUEEN Acerola 40% delivers a dewy infusion, toning skin, restoring glow, and boosting health for radiant, glass-like skin – hello, glow-up!
TRIPLE BEAUTY REMEDY : Niacinamide 4% + Arbutin 2% swoop in to visibly improve the look of spots, help skin look clearer and even for a flawless complexion.
ANTI-AGING & SKIN VIBRANCE SOLUTION: Vitamin E, Ferulic Acid & Tranexamic Acid enhance radiance, reduce wrinkles, and support a youthful, smooth texture.
DEEP MOISTURE & BARRIER REPAIR : 5 ceramides + 8 hyaluronic acids lock in hydration, strengthen your barrier, and leave skin soft, supple – perfect for people with sensitive skin too!
LIGHTWEIGHT, NON-STICKY SELF CARE : EWG Green Grade, silicone/paraben-free drops formula absorbs fast, perfect for neck, face, body application.
EWG VERIFIED: Every ingredient is carefully selected to meet the highest standards for purity and safety.
content.ingredients: Malpighia Glabra (Acerola) Fruit Water, Water, Butylene Glycol, Glycerin, Cetyl Ethylhexanoate, Niacinamide, 1,2-Hexanediol, Arbutin, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Pentaerythrityl Tetrabehenate, Diethoxyethyl Succinate, Betaine, Ceramide NP, Hydroxyethyl Urea, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Melia Azadirachta Leaf Extract, Cetearyl Alcohol, Squalane, Melia Azadirachta Flower Extract, Panthenol, Curcuma Longa (Turmeric) Root Extract, Tocopherol, Carbomer, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Tromethamine, Xanthan Gum, Allantoin, Ethylhexylglycerin, 2,3-Butanediol, Ocimum Sanctum Leaf Extract, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium Carboxymethyl Beta-Glucan, Corallina Officinalis Extract, Malpighia Glabra (Acerola) Fruit Extract, Glyceryl Stearate, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Hydrolyzed Sodium Hyaluronate, Hyaluronic Acid, Hydroxypropyltrimonium Hyaluronate, Potassium Hyaluronate, Rubus Fruticosus (Blackberry) Fruit Extract, Vaccinium Macrocarpon (Cranberry) Fruit Extract, Vaccinium Angustif...
content.safety_warning: For External use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If any adverse reaction occurs, stop using the product. Inform your doctor if your condition persists.
